누가복음 17:1.content: He said to the disciples, “It is impossible that no occasions of stumbling should come, but woe to him through whom they come!

누가복음 17:2.content: It would be better for him if a millstone were hung around his neck, and he were thrown into the sea, rather than that he should cause one of these little ones to stumble.

누가복음 17:3.content: Be careful. If your brother sins against you, rebuke him. If he repents, forgive him.

누가복음 17:4.content: If he sins against you seven times in the day, and seven times returns, saying, ‘I repent,’ you shall forgive him.”

누가복음 17:5.content: The apostles said to the Lord, “Increase our faith.”

누가복음 17:6.content: The Lord said, “If you had faith like a grain of mustard seed, you would tell this sycamore tree, ‘Be uprooted, and be planted in the sea,’ and it would obey you.

누가복음 17:7.content: But who is there among you, having a servant plowing or keeping sheep, that will say when he comes in from the field, ‘Come immediately and sit down at the table,’

누가복음 17:8.content: and will not rather tell him, ‘Prepare my supper, clothe yourself properly, and serve me, while I eat and drink. Afterward you shall eat and drink’?

누가복음 17:9.content: Does he thank that servant because he did the things that were commanded? I think not.

누가복음 17:10.content: Even so you also, when you have done all the things that are commanded you, say, ‘We are unworthy servants. We have done our duty.’ ”

누가복음 17:11.content: As he was on his way to Jerusalem, he was passing along the borders of Samaria and Galilee.

누가복음 17:12.content: As he entered into a certain village, ten men who were lepers met him, who stood at a distance.

누가복음 17:13.content: They lifted up their voices, saying, “Jesus, Master, have mercy on us!”

누가복음 17:14.content: When he saw them, he said to them, “Go and show yourselves to the priests.” As they went, they were cleansed.

누가복음 17:15.content: One of them, when he saw that he was healed, turned back, glorifying God with a loud voice.

누가복음 17:16.content: He fell on his face at Jesus’ feet, giving him thanks; and he was a Samaritan.

누가복음 17:17.content: Jesus answered, “Weren’t the ten cleansed? But where are the nine?

누가복음 17:18.content: Were there none found who returned to give glory to God, except this foreigner?”

누가복음 17:19.content: Then he said to him, “Get up, and go your way. Your faith has healed you.”

누가복음 17:20.content: Being asked by the Pharisees when God’s Kingdom would come, he answered them, “God’s Kingdom doesn’t come with observation;

누가복음 17:21.content: neither will they say, ‘Look, here!’ or, ‘Look, there!’ for behold, God’s Kingdom is within you.”

누가복음 17:22.content: He said to the disciples, “The days will come when you will desire to see one of the days of the Son of Man, and you will not see it.

누가복음 17:23.content: They will tell you, ‘Look, here!’ or ‘Look, there!’ Don’t go away or follow after them,

누가복음 17:24.content: for as the lightning, when it flashes out of one part under the sky, shines to another part under the sky; so will the Son of Man be in his day.

누가복음 17:25.content: But first, he must suffer many things and be rejected by this generation.

누가복음 17:26.content: As it was in the days of Noah, even so will it be also in the days of the Son of Man.

누가복음 17:27.content: They ate, they drank, they married, and they were given in marriage until the day that Noah entered into the ship, and the flood came and destroyed them all.

누가복음 17:28.content: Likewise, even as it was in the days of Lot: they ate, they drank, they bought, they sold, they planted, they built;

누가복음 17:29.content: but in the day that Lot went out from Sodom, it rained fire and sulfur from the sky and destroyed them all.

누가복음 17:30.content: It will be the same way in the day that the Son of Man is revealed.

누가복음 17:31.content: In that day, he who will be on the housetop and his goods in the house, let him not go down to take them away. Let him who is in the field likewise not turn back.

누가복음 17:33.content: Whoever seeks to save his life loses it, but whoever loses his life preserves it.

누가복음 17:34.content: I tell you, in that night there will be two people in one bed. One will be taken and the other will be left.

누가복음 17:35.content: There will be two grinding grain together. One will be taken and the other will be left.”

누가복음 17:37.content: They, answering, asked him, “Where, Lord?” He said to them, “Where the body is, there the vultures will also be gathered together.”
